message:
fix: align wl_commons initSchema with DoltHub hop/wl-commons schema

The local initWLCommonsSchema() was creating tables with a different schema
than the actual hop/wl-commons on DoltHub. This caused schema drift when
running `gt wl join` → EnsureWLCommons.

Changes to match DoltHub exactly:
- towns: add hop_uri, town_type, parent_town; fix trust_level default 0
- completions: add validated_by, stamp_id, parent_completion_id, block_hash,
  hop_uri, validated_at
- stamps: complete rewrite (author/subject/valence model with CHECK constraint)
- badges: rename holder→town_handle, add evidence
- chain_meta: add new table
- wanted: BOOLEAN→TINYINT(1) for sandbox_required

Closes: gt-s2pwmw

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -110,7 +110,7 @@ CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS wanted (
     status VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT 'open',
     effort_level VARCHAR(16) DEFAULT 'medium',
     evidence_url TEXT,
-    sandbox_required BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
+    sandbox_required TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0,
     sandbox_scope JSON,
     sandbox_min_tier VARCHAR(32),
     created_at TIMESTAMP,
@@ -145,7 +145,8 @@ CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS stamps (
     prev_stamp_hash VARCHAR(64),
     block_hash VARCHAR(64),
     hop_uri VARCHAR(512),
-    created_at TIMESTAMP
+    created_at TIMESTAMP,
+    CHECK (NOT(author = subject))
 );
 
 CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS badges (
